commit.subject: LU-18049 tests: sanity-sec 31 with client 2.15.58.31
commit.message:
LU-18049 tests: sanity-sec 31 with client 2.15.58.31

Check how often sanity-sec_31 fails with client v2_15_58-31-g5f3bc2ce7c

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY=31,ONLY_REPEAT=100 serverversion=2.14 clientdistro=el8.8
